paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.05, representing a 2.02 percent increase from the prior close, but a 36.32 percent decrease over the last 20 trading sessions. The price quote is as of July 17, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from Stocktwits discussing the company's lack of revenue and significant loss, as well as its expected signing of binding agreements with tenants over the next year. This news item was published on July 18, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including three 8-K forms and two other filings, with the most recent 8-K form filed on July 15, 2026, disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed, but no Form 144 filings.
